member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper
member.summary: Helper for creating and manipulating CargoQuantity objects. Uses typed interop proxy access (publicized via BepInEx.AssemblyPublicizer).

member.name: P:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.IsAvailable
member.summary: CargoQuantity system is always available via typed interop proxy.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.CreateFromUnits(System.Single)
member.summary: Create CargoQuantity from float units.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.CreateFromMilli(System.Int64)
member.summary: Create CargoQuantity from milli units.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.GetEmpty
member.summary: Get the empty CargoQuantity singleton.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.TryToFloat(System.Object,System.Single@)
member.summary: Convert a CargoQuantity to its float value.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.TryToMilli(System.Object,System.Int64@)
member.summary: Convert a CargoQuantity to its milli value.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.ToDebugString(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert a CargoQuantity to a debug string.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.IsCargoQuantity(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns true when obj is a CargoQuantity.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.GetCargoQuantityType
member.summary: Returns the CargoQuantity System.Type.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.CargoQuantityHelper.Add(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Add two CargoQuantity objects using operator+. Falls back to float conversion if pattern match fails.

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.CollectionConversionTests
member.summary: Testing utilities for IL2CPP collection conversion

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.CollectionConversionTests.TestCollectionConversion(System.Object)
member.summary: Test the ConvertIl2CppList method with various collection types

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.CollectionConversionTests.TestManagedListConversion
member.summary: Test conversion with a managed List for reference

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor
member.summary: Consolidated console command execution system Centralizes all console command logic for mods Provides both console-based and native API execution

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteConsoleCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Execute a console command string

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteFactionAddResource(System.String,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute a faction resource addition command Supports both console and native execution modes

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteFactionAddResourceNative(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Execute faction resource addition using native APIs (standard command) This is the preferred method for mods

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteFactionAddResourceConsole(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Execute faction resource addition using console command (fallback)

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteFactionAddResources(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Single},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute multiple resource additions in batch

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteAddResearchPoints(System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute research points addition

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteAddResearchPointsNative(System.Single)
member.summary: Add research points using native API

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteAddResearchPointsConsole(System.Single)
member.summary: Add research points using console command

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteUnlockBuilding(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute building unlock command

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteUnlockBuildingNative(System.String)
member.summary: Unlock building using native API

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteUnlockBuildingConsole(System.String)
member.summary: Unlock building using console command

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ConsoleCommandExecutor.ExecuteCommand(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Generic method to execute any console command with parameters

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppDebugDumper
member.summary: Debug dumper for IL2CPP objects — writes complete structure to file Useful for understanding object layout when reflection strategies fail

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppDebugDumper.DumpObjectToFile(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Dump complete object structure to file Creates: BepInEx/Debug/IL2CPP-ObjectName-timestamp.txt

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppDebugDumper.FindMembersToFile(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Search for member names matching a pattern and save to file Creates: BepInEx/Debug/IL2CPP-Search-pattern-timestamp.txt

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for safe IL2CPP object manipulation Uses Il2CppInterop for proper IL2CPP support in BepInEx 6.x

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.GetMemberValue``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Safely get a member value from an IL2CPP object

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.SetMemberValue(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Safely set a member value on an IL2CPP object

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.InvokeMethod(System.Object,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Safely invoke a void method on an IL2CPP object
member.returns: True if method was found and invoked successfully, false otherwise

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.InvokeMethod``1(System.Object,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Safely invoke a method on an IL2CPP object with return value

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.SafeInvoke(System.Object,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Safe invoke with fallback for IL2CPP objects

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.GetIl2CppType(System.Object)
member.summary: Get the IL2CPP type of an object

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.ConvertValue``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert values safely between IL2CPP and managed types

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.GetFieldValue``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Alias for GetMemberValue - specifically for field access

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.GetPropertyValue``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Alias for GetMemberValue - specifically for property access

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.SetFieldValue(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Alias for SetMemberValue - specifically for field access

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.SetPropertyValue(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Alias for SetMemberValue - specifically for property access

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.ConvertIl2CppList``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert IL2CPP List/Collection to managed IList Handles both Il2CppSystem.Collections.Generic.List and native collections
member.returns: Managed IList or null if conversion fails

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppExtensions.ConvertIl2CppArray``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert IL2CPP array to managed array
member.returns: Managed array or null if conversion fails

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppObjectInspector
member.summary: Debug tool to inspect IL2CPP objects and discover their actual properties/fields Useful for finding where data actually lives when reflection patterns fail

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppObjectInspector.DumpObject(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Dump all properties and fields of an IL2CPP object Helps debug why IL2CppPropertyReader can't find something

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppObjectInspector.FindMembersByName(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Find a property/field by searching for a substring (case-insensitive) Useful when you don't know the exact name

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppObjectInspector.SafeGetValue``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Get value of any member (property or field) safely Returns default if not found

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppObjectInspector.ListMethods(System.Object)
member.summary: List all public methods (useful for finding getter methods)

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader
member.summary: Robust IL2CPP property reader that handles multiple access strategies Works around IL2CPP reflection limitations by trying multiple approaches

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.ReadProperty``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Read property from IL2CPP object using multiple strategies Returns value or default if all strategies fail

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.PropertyAccessStrategy
member.summary: Strategy pattern for different property access methods

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.PublicPropertyStrategy
member.summary: Strategy 1: Public property with getter

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.PublicFieldStrategy
member.summary: Strategy 2: Public field

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.NonPublicPropertyStrategy
member.summary: Strategy 3: Non-public (protected/internal) property

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.NonPublicFieldStrategy
member.summary: Strategy 4: Non-public (private) field

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.PrivateBackingFieldStrategy
member.summary: Strategy 5: Private backing field (e.g., _propertyName or _property_k__BackingField)

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.IndexerStrategy
member.summary: Strategy 6: Indexed accessor (for collection items or indexed properties)

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.IL2CppPropertyReader.ClearCache
member.summary: Clear the strategy cache (useful for debugging or after IL2CPP changes)

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.NativeWrapper`1
member.summary:
Generic base class for all native IL2CPP object wrappers. Provides safe method invocation, field access, and debug utilities. Zero game-specific logic - usable for any IL2CPP object.
A wrapper built around a null native object is allowed: reports false and every CallNative/GetNativeField returns default without throwing.

member.name: P:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.NativeWrapper`1.IsValidWrapper
member.summary: True when the wrapped native object is non-null. Honest: a wrapper constructed with null reports false (no placeholder object is substituted).

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.NativeWrapper`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Wraps the given native object. Null is tolerated (the wrapper is then invalid: = false and all accessors return default).

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.NativeWrapper`1.CallNativeVoid(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invoke a void method on the native object.
member.returns: True when the method was found and invoked without error — callers implementing a fallback (e.g. direct field write) must check this.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.NativeWrapper`1.SetNativeField``1(System.String,``0,System.Nullable{System.Reflection.BindingFlags})
member.returns: True when the field was found and written.

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions
member.summary: High-level convenience extensions for common Per Aspera operations Simplifies access to game singletons, resources, and common patterns

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetBaseGame
member.summary: Get BaseGame.Instance safely

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetCurrentUniverse
member.summary: Get current Universe from BaseGame

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetCurrentPlanet
member.summary: Get current Planet from Universe

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetCurrentFaction
member.summary: Get current Faction from Universe

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetFactionStockpile(System.Object)
member.summary: Get faction's stockpile

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.ParseResourceType(System.String)
member.summary: Parse resource type string to enum value

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.CreateCargoQuantity(System.Single)
member.summary: Create a CargoQuantity instance

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.AddResourcesToFaction(System.Object,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Add resources to faction's stockpile

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetConsole
member.summary: Get Console instance

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.ExecuteConsoleCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Execute console command

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.CreatePatchTarget(System.String,System.String,System.Type[])
member.summary: Create a Harmony patch target method resolver

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.GetInteractionManager
member.summary: Get InteractionManager.Instance safely

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.PerAsperaExtensions.ExecuteConsoleCommand(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a console command with the given arguments

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.GameObjectExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for common game object operations

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.GameObjectExtensions.GetBuildings(System.Object)
member.summary: Get all buildings from a planet

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.GameObjectExtensions.GetFaction(System.Object)
member.summary: Get faction from a building

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.GameObjectExtensions.GetBuildingType(System.Object)
member.summary: Get building type from a building

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers
member.summary: Reflection helpers for IL2CPP environments Centralizes type discovery functions for decompiled assemblies CORRECTED: Removed duplicated extension methods (use IL2CPP native extensions instead)

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.FindType(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a type by name across all loaded assemblies OPTIMIZED: Uses TypeDiscoveryCache via reflection to avoid circular dependency

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.TryUseCachedDiscovery(System.String)
member.summary: Try to use TypeDiscoveryCache via reflection to avoid circular dependency

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.FindTypeSlowFallback(System.String)
member.summary: Original slow type discovery method (fallback only)

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.FindTypes(System.Func{System.Type,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Finds all types matching the given predicate

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.TypeExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a type exists without throwing exceptions

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.GetTypesInNamespace(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all types in a specific namespace

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.GetDerivedTypes(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets all types that inherit from a specific base type

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.SafeInvoke(System.Object,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Safe method invocation with error handling
member.returns: Method result or null if failed

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.SafeGetValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Safe field/property access

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.GetSingletonInstance``1
member.summary: Get singleton instance of specified type

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.ReflectionHelpers.GetSingletonInstance(System.Type)
member.summary: Get singleton instance by type

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to simplify reflection operations Provides safe member access and invocation

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions.SafeInvoke(System.Object,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Safely invokes a method by name with error handling
member.returns: Method result or null if failed

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions.GetMemberValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a property or field value by name
member.returns: Member value or null if not found

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions.HasMember(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a member (property or field) exists on the object

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions.GetMemberValue``1(System.Object,System.String,``0)
member.summary: Gets strongly typed member value with fallback
member.param: Default value if not found or wrong type

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions.HasMethod(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if object has a method with specific name

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.TypeExtensions.SafeCast``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Safe type casting with error handling

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.UnityMeshExtensions
M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.UnityMeshExtensions.SetVerticesSafe(UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.Vector3})
member.summary: Sets mesh vertices using the IL2CPP List overload preserved at runtime. Replaces mesh.vertices = array and SetVertices(Vector3[]), both stripped.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.UnityMeshExtensions.SetTrianglesSafe(UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets mesh triangles using the IL2CPP array overload preserved at runtime. Replaces mesh.triangles = array, stripped at runtime.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.IL2CPP.UnityMeshExtensions.SetUVsSafe(UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEngine.Vector2})
member.summary: Sets mesh UVs using the IL2CPP List overload preserved at runtime. Replaces mesh.uv = array and SetUVs(int, Vector2[]), both stripped.

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera
member.summary: Centralized logging system for Per Aspera mods Provides both BepInEx console logging and file-based logging

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.#cctor
member.summary: Static constructor to ensure log directory exists

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a LogAspera instance with a specific component name
member.param: Component name to identify log source

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.Info(System.String)
member.summary: Logs an information message

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.Debug(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a debug message

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.Warning(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.Error(System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.Fatal(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a fatal message

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.Log(BepInEx.Logging.LogLevel,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message with custom level

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.WriteToFile(System.String)
member.summary: Writes message to component-specific log file

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.CleanOldLogs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Cleans old log files (call manually)
member.param: Number of days to keep logs

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.LogInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Static convenience method for quick logging

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.LogDebug(System.String)
member.summary: Static convenience method for debug logging

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.LogWarning(System.String)
member.summary: Static convenience method for warning logging

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.LogError(System.String)
member.summary: Static convenience method for error logging

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.LogAspera.LogFatal(System.String)
member.summary: Static convenience method for fatal logging

member.name: T:PerAspera.Core.Utilities
member.summary: General utility functions for Per Aspera modding Includes reflection helpers, type utilities, and common operations

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.Log(System.Action{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Thread-safe logging helper

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.SetFieldOrProp(System.Object,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets a field or property value using reflection. RS0030 suppressed: intentional generic reflection for arbitrary IL2CPP objects.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.GetFloatFieldOrProp(System.Object,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Gets a float value from field or property, with default fallback. RS0030 suppressed: intentional generic reflection for arbitrary IL2CPP objects.

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.GetMemberValue``1(System.Object,System.String[],System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Gets member value by trying multiple names (field/property/method)
member.param: Array of possible member names to try
member.returns: Value cast to T or null

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.GetMemberValue(System.Object,System.String[],System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Gets member value by trying multiple names (field/property/method)
member.param: Array of possible member names to try

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.FindTypeStatic(System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Finds a type by name across all loaded assemblies
member.returns: Type or null if not found

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.ToFloat(System.Object,System.Single)
member.summary: Safe conversion to float with fallback

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.ToInt(System.Object,System.Int32)
member.summary: Safe conversion to int with fallback

member.name: M:PerAspera.Core.Utilities.ToString(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Safe string conversion
